chemo.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
notes: Reduced dose for age ≥ 60 to lower neurotoxicity risk
Monitor cerebellar signs before each dose
Steroid eye drops required (Prednisolone or equivalent)

nursingNotes: Indication: AML consolidation in patients ≥ 60 years
Higher risk for neurotoxicity — monitor gait, speech, coordination
Check renal function prior to dosing — impacts toxicity
Expect cytopenias; transfusion support may be required
